log_info_p_one: Mainly for functionalities in the FanArts section.
log_info_p_two: You will be able to access most sections and features of the webpage, so it is not necessary; the biggest restriction of not having a session is that you will not be able to upload FanArts.
log_info_p_three: Press continue to create an account.
message_body_no_loged_in: You must logged in to upload access this page
